body:
## Goal
Create a complete drum setup article for Brann Dailor (Mastodon) targeting 'brann dailor drum kit' and related queries.

**GSC signal:** 'brann dailor drum kit' — 13 impressions, 0% CTR, pos 5.2. Page 1 visibility with zero click-through = bad meta + no editorial depth. Same situation as Matt Greiner pre-article (15.79% CTR after article).

## Action
Add `'brann-dailor-mastodon-drum-setup'` entry to `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`:
- Kit: Tama Starclassic Maple (his long-time setup), later expanded with additional configurations
- Cymbals: Istanbul Agop / Zildjian
- Sticks: Vater (he has used various)
- Key albums to cover: Leviathan (2004), Blood Mountain (2006), Crack the Skye (2009), The Hunter (2011), Emperor of Sand (2017)
- Known for: Melodic drumming, ghost notes, jazz-influenced approach within sludge/prog metal context
- Also the band's vocalist — unusual dual role
- FAQ section targeting: 'what drums does brann dailor use', 'brann dailor kit', 'mastodon drummer gear'

## Done
- [ ] Article entry in albumArticles.js with full kit breakdown, cymbals, sticks, career eras, FAQ
- [ ] LLM markdown at `/public/llms/articles/brann-dailor-mastodon-drum-setup.md`
- [ ] Sitemap entry for the article
title: feat: Brann Dailor drum setup article — Mastodon, prog-sludge titan, GSC pos 5.2 / 0% CTR
